general.name: mos_target_unwise_parquet
general.description: The unWISE catalog, containing the positions and fluxes of approximately two billion objects observed by the Wide-field Infrared Survey Explorer (WISE). For more details, see Schlafly et al. (2019). The original catalogs are hosted at https://catalog.unwise.me/catalogs.html
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_unwise.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

x_w1.name: x_w1
x_w1.description: x coordinate from the W1 measurement of the source

x_w2.name: x_w2
x_w2.description: x coordinate from the W2 measurement of the source

y_w1.name: y_w1
y_w1.description: y coordinate from the W1 measurement of the source

y_w2.name: y_w2
y_w2.description: y coordinate from the W2 measurement of the source

flux_w1.name: flux_w1
flux_w1.description: flux from the W1 measurement of the source

flux_w2.name: flux_w2
flux_w2.description: flux from the W2 measurement of the source

dx_w1.name: dx_w1
dx_w1.description: uncertainty in x from the W1 measurement of the source

dx_w2.name: dx_w2
dx_w2.description: uncertainty in x from the W2 measurement of the source

dy_w1.name: dy_w1
dy_w1.description: uncertainty in y from the W1 measurement of the source

dy_w2.name: dy_w2
dy_w2.description: uncertainty in y from the W2 measurement of the source

dflux_w1.name: dflux_w1
dflux_w1.description: uncertainty in flux (statistical only) from the W1 measurement

dflux_w2.name: dflux_w2
dflux_w2.description: uncertainty in flux (statistical only) from the W2 measurement

rchi2_w1.name: rchi2_w1
rchi2_w1.description: average chi2 per pixel, weighted by PSF from the W1 measurement of the source

rchi2_w2.name: rchi2_w2
rchi2_w2.description: average chi2 per pixel, weighted by PSF from the W2 measurement of the source

fracflux_w1.name: fracflux_w1
fracflux_w1.description: fraction of flux in this object's PSF that comes from this object from the W1 measurement of the source

fracflux_w2.name: fracflux_w2
fracflux_w2.description: fraction of flux in this object's PSF that comes from this object from the W2 measurement of the source

fluxlbs_w1.name: fluxlbs_w1
fluxlbs_w1.description: local-background-subtracted flux from the W1 measurement of the source

fluxlbs_w2.name: fluxlbs_w2
fluxlbs_w2.description: local-background-subtracted flux from the W2 measurement of the source

dfluxlbs_w1.name: dfluxlbs_w1
dfluxlbs_w1.description: uncertainty in local-background-subtracted flux from the W1 measurement of the source

dfluxlbs_w2.name: dfluxlbs_w2
dfluxlbs_w2.description: uncertainty in local-background-subtracted flux from the W2 measurement of the source

fwhm_w1.name: fwhm_w1
fwhm_w1.description: full-width at half-maximum of PSF from the W1 measurement of the source

fwhm_w2.name: fwhm_w2
fwhm_w2.description: full-width at half-maximum of PSF from the W2 measurement of the source

spread_model_w1.name: spread_model_w1
spread_model_w1.description: SExtractor spread_model parameter from the W1 measurement of the source

spread_model_w2.name: spread_model_w2
spread_model_w2.description: SExtractor spread_model parameter from the W2 measurement of the source

dspread_model_w1.name: dspread_model_w1
dspread_model_w1.description: uncertainty in spread_model from the W1 measurement of the source

dspread_model_w2.name: dspread_model_w2
dspread_model_w2.description: uncertainty in spread_model from the W2 measurement of the source

sky_w1.name: sky_w1
sky_w1.description: sky flux from the W1 measurement of the source

sky_w2.name: sky_w2
sky_w2.description: sky flux from the W2 measurement of the source

ra12_w1.name: ra12_w1
ra12_w1.description: RA position from individual-image catalogs from the W1 measurement of the source

ra12_w2.name: ra12_w2
ra12_w2.description: RA position from individual-image catalogs from the W2 measurement of the source

dec12_w1.name: dec12_w1
dec12_w1.description: Dec position from individual-image catalogs from the W1 measurement of the source

dec12_w2.name: dec12_w2
dec12_w2.description: Dec position from individual-image catalogs from the W2 measurement of the source

unwise_detid_w1.name: unwise_detid_w1
unwise_detid_w1.description: unWISE detection ID from the W1 measurement of the source

unwise_detid_w2.name: unwise_detid_w2
unwise_detid_w2.description: unWISE detection ID from the W2 measurement of the source

nm_w1.name: nm_w1
nm_w1.description: number of single-exposure images of this part of sky in coadd for the W1 band

nm_w2.name: nm_w2
nm_w2.description: number of single-exposure images of this part of sky in coadd for the W2 band

primary12_w1.name: primary12_w1
primary12_w1.description: 'primary' status from individual-image catalogs from the W1 measurement of the source

primary12_w2.name: primary12_w2
primary12_w2.description: 'primary' status from individual-image catalogs from the W2 measurement of the source

flags_unwise_w1.name: flags_unwise_w1
flags_unwise_w1.description: unWISE Coadd Flags flags at central pixel for the W1 measurement of the source

flags_unwise_w2.name: flags_unwise_w2
flags_unwise_w2.description: unWISE Coadd Flags flags at central pixel for the W2 measurement of the source

flags_info_w1.name: flags_info_w1
flags_info_w1.description: additional informational flags at central pixel for the W1 measurement of the source

flags_info_w2.name: flags_info_w2
flags_info_w2.description: additional informational flags at central pixel for the W2 measurement of the source

ra.name: ra
ra.description: RA W1 position, if available; otherwise W2 position

dec.name: dec
dec.description: Declination W1 position, if available; otherwise W2 position

primary_status.name: primary_status
primary_status.description: W1 primary status, if available; otherwise W2 primary status
